kinyarwanda.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Subira ku rutonde rw'ibikoresho bya STEM Lab
kinyarwanda.how_sharp_or_flat_you_are_aim_for_the_: Uko uri hejuru cyangwa hasi. Genza akarere k'icyatsi ko hagati (±10 cents).
kinyarwanda.your_pitch_over_time_mapped_to_musical: Ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe mu gihe, bwashyizwe ku noti z'umuziki. Icyatsi = nyacyo, umuhondo = hafi, umutuku = ijwi ridahuye.
kinyarwanda.piano_roll_showing_pitch_history_green: Piano roll yerekana amateka y'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi. Umurongo w'icyatsi werekana kuririmba nyako (mu 10 cents), umuhondo hafi (mu 25 cents), umutuku ijwi ridahuye (hejuru ya 25 cents).
kinyarwanda.click_a_note_to_hear_the_tone_try_to_m: Kanda noti kugira ngo wumve ijwi. Gerageza kuryifatanya n'ijwi ryawe!
kinyarwanda.a_tone_plays_match_it_with_your_voice_: Ijwi rirumvikana — rihuze n'ijwi ryawe! Fata ubuhagarike nyabwo mu isegonda rimwe. Amanota ashingiye ku muvuduko.
kinyarwanda.sing_this_note_and_hold_it_within_10_c: Ririmba iyi noti unayifate mu 10 cents mu isegonda rimwe
kinyarwanda.this_will_guide_you_through_finding_yo: Ibi bizakuyobora mu gushakisha noti zawe zoroheye zo hasi cyane n'izo hejuru cyane. Menya neza ko mikorofoni ikora.
kinyarwanda.sing_your_lowest_comfortable_note: Ririmba noti yawe yo hasi cyane yoroheye
kinyarwanda.hold_the_note_steady_for_about_1_secon: Fata noti ihamye mu gihe kigera ku isegonda rimwe.
kinyarwanda.cancel_vocal_range_test_low_range: Kuraho ikizamini cy'urwego rw'ijwi (urwego rwo hasi)
kinyarwanda.now_sing_your_highest_comfortable_note: Noneho ririmba noti yawe yo hejuru cyane yoroheye
kinyarwanda.cancel_vocal_range_test_high_range: Kuraho ikizamini cy'urwego rw'ijwi (urwego rwo hejuru)
kinyarwanda.estimated_from_your_lowest_note_true_v: Byakekejwe hakoreshejwe noti yawe yo hasi cyane — ubwoko nyabwo bw'ijwi bushingiye kandi ku rwego ruboroheye (tessitura) n'ibara ry'ijwi, atari ku rwego gusa.
kinyarwanda.piano_keyboard_showing_vocal_range_use: Klaviye ya piano yerekana urwego rw'ijwi. Koresha buto z'utwambi tw'ibumoso/iburyo kugira ngo unyuremo noti, Enter cyangwa Space kugira ngo ucurange.
kinyarwanda.very_little_pitch_variation_good_for_c: Impinduka nke cyane z'ubuhagarike. Byiza ku ivange ry'itsinda ry'abaririmbyi!
kinyarwanda.vibrato_rate_is_above_8_hz_try_to_rela: Igipimo cya vibrato kiri hejuru ya 8 Hz. Gerageza kuruhuka no kugabanya umuvuduko.
kinyarwanda.vibrato_rate_is_below_4_hz_try_to_ener: Igipimo cya vibrato kiri hasi ya 4 Hz. Gerageza guha imbaraga umuyaga wawe.
kinyarwanda.vibrato_width_exceeds_100_cents_try_fo: Ubugari bwa vibrato burenga 100 cents. Genza kunyeganyega guto.
kinyarwanda.beautiful_rate_and_depth_are_in_the_id: Byiza! Igipimo n'ubujyakuzimu biri mu rwego rwiza cyane.
kinyarwanda.getting_there_aim_for_5_7_hz_rate_and_: Hafi kugera! Genza igipimo cya 5-7 Hz n'ubujyakuzimu bwa 30-80 cents.
kinyarwanda.sustain_a_note_with_no_vibrato_practic: Fata noti nta vibrato. Itoze kugenzura ijwi ryawe kugira ngo rikomeze kuba rihamye rwose.
kinyarwanda.sustain_a_note_and_let_your_natural_vi: Fata noti kandi ureke vibrato yawe kamere igaragare. Ntuyihatire — ruhuka kandi ureke ibibe.
kinyarwanda.try_to_vibrate_at_exactly_6_hz_6_oscil: Gerageza kunyeganyega neza kuri 6 Hz (kunyeganyega 6 mu isegonda). Reba isomo ry'igipimo.
kinyarwanda.try_to_keep_vibrato_depth_around_50_ce: Gerageza kubika ubujyakuzimu bwa vibrato hafi ya 50 cents. Ntabwo bigari cyane, ntabwo bito cyane.
kinyarwanda.sustain_a_note_to_see_your_vibrato_pat: Fata noti kugira ngo urebe uburyo bwa vibrato yawe. Umurongo wo hagati ni ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe bw'impuzandengo.
kinyarwanda.vibrato_waveform_trace_showing_pitch_d: Ikimenyetso cy'ishusho y'umuraba wa vibrato cyerekana ihindagurika ry'ubuhagarike mu gihe
kinyarwanda.staff_notation_showing_reference_targe: Inyandiko y'umurongo w'umuziki yerekana icyitegererezo, intego, na noti yawe iriho ubu
kinyarwanda.explore_how_your_body_makes_sound_clic: Shakisha uburyo umubiri wawe ukora amajwi. Kanda akarere kugira ngo wige kuri ako, cyangwa gukoresha animasiyo kugira ngo urebe uko gikora.
kinyarwanda.sagittal_cross_section_diagram_of_the_: Igishushanyo cy'igice cya sagittal cy'inzira y'ijwi ry'umuntu. Koresha buto z'utwambi tw'ibumoso/iburyo kugira ngo unyure ku turere, Enter cyangwa Space kugira ngo uhitemo.
kinyarwanda.understanding_these_conditions_helps_y: Gusobanukirwa izi mimerere bigufasha kumenya ibimenyetso by'iburira hakiri kare. Niba ufite ibimenyetso bikomeje, jya kwa muganga.
kinyarwanda.this_information_is_educational_only_i: 👨‍⚕️ Aya makuru ni ay'uburezi gusa. Si inama y'ubuvuzi. Niba uhangayikishijwe n'ijwi ryawe, jya kwa muganga w'amatwi-izuru-umuhogo cyangwa umuhanga mu kuvuga.
kinyarwanda.get_personalized_vocal_health_tips_app: Bona inama z'ubuzima bw'ijwi zihariye zihuye n'urwego rwawe rw'ishuri.
kinyarwanda.breathe_deep_into_your_belly_diaphragm: Humeka wimbitse mu nda yawe (diyaferagime), atari mu gituza.
kinyarwanda.keep_your_core_engaged_to_control_airf: Bika imitsi yawe yo hagati ikora kugira ngo ugenzure umuyaga mu gihe uririmba.
kinyarwanda.let_the_air_flow_smoothly_and_evenly_t: Reka umuyaga utembe neza kandi ku buryo bungana unyuze mu migozi y'ijwi ryawe.
kinyarwanda.feet_shoulder_width_apart_weight_balan: Ibirenge ku bugari bw'ibitugu, uburemere bungana
kinyarwanda.shoulders_relaxed_and_rolled_back_not_: Ibitugu byoroheye kandi bizingiye inyuma (atari byunamye)
kinyarwanda.chin_level_not_tilted_up_or_down: Akanwa karinganiye — atari kunamye hejuru cyangwa hasi
kinyarwanda.jaw_relaxed_and_slightly_dropped_when_: Urwasaya rworoheye kandi rumanuka gato mu gihe uririmba
kinyarwanda.avoid_locking_knees_tensing_neck_or_cl: Irinde: gupfunyika amavi, kunanira ijosi, cyangwa kwikanyiza urwasaya
kinyarwanda.read_the_notes_on_the_staff_and_sing_t: Soma noti ku murongo w'umuziki uzirimbe ukurikije. Kumenya ubuhagarike bw'ijwi mu gihe nyacyo bigenzura ukuri kwawe.
kinyarwanda.pitch_training_vocal_range_vibrato_int: Kwitoza ubuhagarike, urwego rw'ijwi, vibrato, no kuririmba intera y'ijwi
kinyarwanda.sing_into_the_mic_the_lab_tracks_frequ: Ririmba muri mikorofoni; laboratwari ikurikirana frecwensi mu gihe nyacyo. Abaririmbyi batojwe babika ubuhagarike mu ±5 cents (1/20 by'ijwi rya hagati) — uku ni ko ubuhagarike bwuzuye bwumvikana.
kinyarwanda.most_untrained_voices_span_1_5_2_octav: Amajwi menshi atatojwe akwira octave 1.5-2; abaririmbyi ba kera batojwe bagera kuri 3 cyangwa hejuru. Kwagura urwego ahanini ni ukuvanga ba-rejistre, atari gukururira hejuru na hasi gusa.
kinyarwanda.healthy_vibrato_5_7_hz_oscillation_60_: Vibrato nzima: kunyeganyega kwa 5-7 Hz, kufite ubugari bwa ~60-100 cents. Buhoro cyane = kunyeganyega; byihuta cyane = guhinda. Vibrato ni umurimo w'inkunga y'umwuka yoroheye, atari ubuhanga bwihariye.
kinyarwanda.major_3rd_vs_minor_3rd_is_the_single_m: Uwa gatatu munini na uwa gatatu muto ni ababiri b'intera bahangayikishije cyane abatangira. Ibimenyetso byo kwibuka: uwa gatatu munini = "Oh when the saints", uwa gatatu muto = "Greensleeves". Bubaka ukumva bijyanye.
kinyarwanda.lip_trills_sirens_before_any_sustained: Kunyeganyega kw'iminwa + siyereni mbere yo kuririmba kose kurambye. Iminota 5-10 yo gushyushya ku mbaraga nke igabanya ibyago byo gukoresha imigozi y'ijwi cyane ku kigero cy'igice. Gusimbuka gushyushya ni impamvu ya nimero 1 y'ibikomere by'ijwi bishobora kwirindwa.
kinyarwanda.solf_ge_do_re_mi_letter_names_for_sigh: Solfège (do-re-mi) iruta amazina y'inyuguti mu gusoma inyandiko kuko uduce tw'amagambo dushyira mu kode isano y'intera, atari ibimenyetso by'ubuhagarike gusa. Do igenda iruta do ihamye ku muziki w'amajwi.
kinyarwanda.resonance_lab_discover_your_vocal_tone: Laboratwari y'Isubiramo ry'Amajwi — Menya Ibara ry'Ijwi Ryawe
kinyarwanda.two_sliders_throat_openness_and_soft_p: Ba-slider babiri — gufungura umuhogo no kuzamura ijuru ry'akanwa ryoroshye — bahurira mu bwiza bune bw'ibara ry'ijwi (bukungahaye, bwaka, bushyushye, bw'izuru). Nta manota, nta gushyira ahagaragara: gerageza, andika, kandi usobanure ibyo umenya.
kinyarwanda.operatic_professional_tone_full_resona: Ibara ry'ijwi rya opera / ry'umwuga. Isubiramo ryuzuye.
kinyarwanda.forward_placement_pop_belt_style: Gushyira imbere. Uburyo bwa pop / belting.
kinyarwanda.sliders_for_throat_openness_soft_palat: Ba-slider bo gufungura umuhogo, kuzamura ijuru ry'akanwa ryoroshye. Gutandukanya bihariye n'amabara 4 y'ijwi. Nta manota, nta gushyira ahagaragara.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_what_anatomical_adjustments: Igitekerezo: Ni izihe mpinduka z'imiterere y'umubiri zitanga ibara ry'ijwi bukungahaye?
kinyarwanda.why_do_classical_singers_lift_the_pala: Kuki abaririmbyi ba kera bazamura ijuru ry'akanwa?
kinyarwanda.how_does_throat_openness_affect_overto: Gufungura umuhogo bigira ingaruka ki ku rukurikirane rw'amajwi yo hejuru?
kinyarwanda.explain_how_resonance_cavity_shape_con: Sobanura uko imiterere y'umwobo w'isubiramo igenzura ibara ry'ijwi.
kinyarwanda.design_note_discrete_4_tone_marker_no_: Icyitonderwa cy'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cyihariye cy'amabara 4 y'ijwi; nta manota ya akustike; nta gushyira ahagaragara — ku bushake.
